scheme_name: Pathari Kshetr Talab Nirman Aadharit Matsya Paalan ki Yojana
page_title: Pathari Kshetr Talab Nirman Aadharit Matsya Paalan ki Yojana

details: The "Pathari Kshetr Talab Nirman Aadharit Matsya Paalan ki Yojana" was launched by the Animal and Fisheries Resources Department, Government of Bihar. The scheme aims to promote fisheries by constructing ponds and setting up related supporting units in plateau-dominated districts. The initiative is designed to create new employment opportunities and provide a means of livelihood for farmers.
benefits: 60% after pond construction, 40% after installation of related units and purchase of inputs.
eligibility: The applicant must own or lease land in the identified plateau-dominated districts.
A person/family should construct a pond of a maximum of one acre and a minimum 0.4-acre water area i.e. 0.5-acre area.
The applicant should install a concrete board on the pond.
The board should be made of an iron sheet of size 4 feet x 3 feet, standing four feet at an iron angle, on which the description will be written with paint.

online: and clicks the "Applications are being invited for all the schemes of the financial year (2024-25),
Select the category: Individual and complete all basic details of the applicant for registration, including category, caste, applicant name, date of birth, address, bank details, etc.
Enter a valid 10-digit mobile number and click to send OTP.
An OTP will be sent to the provided mobile number.
Enter the OTP; after verification of the OTP, you will receive a Registration Number and Password.
Click on the "Login" and enter the Registration Number and Password.
: Select "Scheme name" under the "Matsya Yojana" option on the top menu.
Applicant need to provide the following details :
Click on the submit button as well print the application form and submit it to the District Fisheries Office along with attachments.

documents_required: Bank Branch Name, Account Number, IFSC code
Attested Copies of Aadhar Card/Ration Card/Voter ID Card
Land Ownership Certificate/Updated Revenue Receipt or Lease Agreement
Notarized Affidavit for land dispute-free status

faqs.question: What is the total cost of the scheme?
faqs.answer: Planning of Fish Farming based on Plateau Area Pond Construction" at a total cost is ₹1469.60 lakh.

faqs.question: How much subsidy is provided under the scheme?
faqs.answer: An 80% subsidy on the unit cost of ₹16,70,000/- per acre is provided.

faqs.question: What is the maximum pond size eligible for subsidy?
faqs.answer: The benefit of a package unit on the construction of a pond of a maximum of 1 acre.

faqs.question: Who can apply for the scheme?
faqs.answer: Individuals or families with private or lease land in the identified districts.

faqs.question: How is the subsidy paid?
faqs.answer: In two installments: 60% after pond construction and 40% after installation of related units and purchase of inputs.

faqs.question: What if the scheme is not completed by the beneficiary?
faqs.answer: The subsidy amount received will be recoverable.

faqs.question: What kind of land is suitable for the scheme?
faqs.answer: Land in plateau-dominated districts that is suitable for fish farming.

faqs.question: What are the benefits of the scheme?
faqs.answer: Utilization of Terai region land, means of livelihood for beneficiaries, creation of employment opportunities, and increased income for farmers.

faqs.question: What is the process of selecting beneficiaries?
faqs.answer: Applications are reviewed by the District Fisheries Officer and a selection committee. Work orders are issued to selected beneficiaries.

faqs.question: How is the subsidy amount calculated?
faqs.answer: Based on the actual expenditure or the fixed unit cost, whichever is lower.

faqs.question: What happens if there are more applications than the target?
faqs.answer: A waiting list is prepared and maintained.

faqs.question: Can beneficiaries apply for bank loans for the remaining amount?
faqs.answer: Yes, the remaining amount can be paid by the beneficiary themselves or through bank loans.

faqs.question: What kind of units will be installed under the scheme?
faqs.answer: Tube well, solar pump, advanced input, and shed.

faqs.question: How can I apply for the scheme?
faqs.answer: By submitting an online application form after the advertisement is published in state-level newspapers.

faqs.question: Who will verify the application documents?
faqs.answer: The District Fisheries Officer and the selection committee.
